channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish by tree, 9th April
item.description:
Rubbish just left by the tree. Consistent problem for over five years. The sign that was put there to warn people about fly tipping has been pulled down. Bored of complaining about this and no solution being provided.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 114, Vestry Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish by tree, 9th April
item.description:
Rubbish just left by the tree. Consistent problem for over five years. The sign that was put there to warn people about fly tipping has been pulled down. Bored of complaining about this and no solution being provided.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 114, Vestry Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large bag of gathered leaves has not been removed, 9th April
item.description:
Several months ago, leaves were swept up and placed here in a large bag (presumably by council workers). The bag was not collected and is still here, obstructing the pavement.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sim Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle and trailer illegally parked, 9th April
item.description:
This vehicle and trailer or similar belonging to resident of harper close is parked here nearly every day despite new parking notice being erected after it was removed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harper Close, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Picnic area dirty, 9th April
item.description:
This area is always full of rubbish. The bushes are full of food packaging and also clothes?? People come here I'd guess, eat food and then leave the rubbish behind. Drinks cans in the bushes etc.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensbourne Greenway, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement obstruction/cracked slabs, 9th April
item.description:
Two weeks since first reported and nothing has been done. The bricks from the wall are still on the pavement. The hedge hasn't been trimmed. The cracked and sunken slabs haven't been fixed. It looks like someone came out to put the barriers in place then forgot about it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Goring Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped furniture, 9th April
item.description:
There is always an accumulation of waste in this car park. Some seems to have been removed recently but there is still what looks like a bed headboard in the bushes which has been there for many months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oxley Close, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: You can tell it is half term., 9th April
item.description:
The play area when I arrived at 10am today was covered in rubbish. The flower beds near the basketball hoops are full of litter, as is the grass area surrounding the play ground. Sadly you wanted to regenerate this play area and develop it but you don't seem to have employed more people or more competent staff to actually deal with the higher traffic rate. You have gardeners putting in effort to make it look good and one day of sun you're already behind.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensbourne Greenway, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car blocking the pavement, 9th April
item.description:
This car has been parked like this since last week. Nobody came out to ticket it by the looks of it. Can't get through to nsl. HT09LGA

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westbury Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two potholes at the end of silverwalk, near gate for filigree court, 9th April
item.description:
This has been here for a few months now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Silver Walk, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tennyson with glengall, 9th April
item.description:
Bag has been dropped off a few minutes after someone collected the fly tipping that had been on pavement for days!!!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tennyson Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Speeding, 9th April
item.description:
There is to much speeding along this rd from Field to the width restrictions further down the rd the noise is terrible with the cars then weekends you get the motorbikes racing up and down all I'm asking could there be any way the council could put some speed humps along there to try and help the people who live around here feel a little bit safer .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Purfleet Road
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture dumped, 9th April
item.description:
Furniture dumped on pavement outside 1 Dunsmure RdN16 5PU

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunsmure Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside of 29 Brondesbury Villas, 9th April
item.description:
An ironing board has been dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Several dangerous potholes, 9th April
item.description:
There are several dangerous potholes very close to each other and have been like this for a while.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 273, Oakleigh Road North, Brunswick Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover sticking up, 9th April
item.description:
Dangerous - someone could trip over it/fall down the hole

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nether Street, North Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly, 9th April
item.description:
Tip

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Daubeney Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish thrown everywhere by bin collections, 9th April
item.description:
The bins were collected, we saw them not collect everything and then drop items in the road. The place is a mess and stinks of rotting meat. Please sort asap as we have clients coming to our offices.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Well Hall Parade, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown Hedge DANGER !!!, 9th April
item.description:
More than 3years and the problem has not been fixed. The concrete posts that support the fencing are broken. It not possible for a person with disabilities to walk safely by. Vehicles are regularly parked there to compound the issue so that pedestrians have to walk in the road. The issue will now be elevated to local councillors.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wynford Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping of scaffolding, 9th April
item.description:
This has been here for at least 3-4 years with no explanation and no work being done. Unsure if it council house or council works but this is ugly and nothing being done. Surround neighbours have no idea who or what is happening with it also. Needs to be taken down!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Muschamp Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
